title: T-Deck: border router mode (WiFi backhaul)
description: Enable LilyGO T-Deck as border router with WiFi backhaul. ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + WiFi + screen + keyboard. Same as Heltec V3 but with UI for local config/status. Chunky, higher battery drain than Heltec. Board files exist at lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/. $60.
close_reason: Updated lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf with full WiFi backhaul 6LBR settings (LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION, WIFI_SSID/PSK, NET tuning, heaps=131072, L2 provisioning, stacks, HAL). Mirrors validated Heltec V3 pattern for T-Deck border router mode. Board files now enable runtime.
